svg.title: AI API Security Testing Framework — 6-Agent Pipeline
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the 6-agent pipeline from OpenAPI spec input through Understanding, Test Generation, Execution, Validation, Security Analysis, to Report output.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What OpenAPI spec formats does the framework support?')
sendPrompt('How does the API Understanding Agent work?')
g.text: Parses spec · LLM risk enrichment per endpoint

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of test cases does the Test Generation Agent create?')
g.text: Positive · Negative · Fuzz · SSRF · Auth bypass

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Execution Agent handle concurrent requests?')
g.text: Async HTTP · Retry logic · Auth flow manager

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Validation Agent check for?')
g.text: Status codes · JSON schema · Sensitive data leaks

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Security Agent detect OWASP vulnerabilities?')
g.text: OWASP API1–10 · Confidence scoring · LLM deep scan

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Reporting Agent output?')
g.text: HTML dashboard · JSON · Posture diff vs prev run

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does historical run diffing work?')
